title: BPSC 72 PCS Pre Online Form 2026
description: Bihar BPSC 72nd Pre Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 1230 Post Post Update Date: 15-05-2026 Short Description : Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Bihar BPSC Pre Exam 72nd CCE Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC 72 Pre Exam 2026 Vacancy with a total of 1230 vacancies.
